GBQualifier.GBQualifier_value: Porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus
contains papain-like cysteine proteinase domains 1a (PCP1a) and 1b (PCP1b); cleavage at the C-terminus is mediated by PCP1b
contains cysteine proteinase 2 domain (CP2) that mediates cleavage at the C-terminus; N-terminus is the product of proteinase PCP1b
